title: wedelia
intro: Wedelia, also known as Wedelia calenduloides or the goat's foot, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Wedelia have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Wedelia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
